issues.description: Text contains '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a duration violation.
Effect grants +1000 per every 5 cards in trash, not per individual trashed card. Current 'perTrashedCard:true' is incorrect. Should use 'perXCards':5 or similar mechanic to represent 'every 5 cards'.
Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' (passive effect that applies at start of your turn), not 'Activated'. Text shows no player activation required.
